case_title: STEMWELL, LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ROBERT GORTER et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GORTER, ROBERT ("DR. GORTER")
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $497.80 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE OCT-16-2007, FILED BY DEFENDANT GORTER, ROBERT ("DR. GORTER")

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEMWELL, LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT GORTER, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $497.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $497.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (NO SASE, COPY IN 302 OUTBOX)
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: CHARTON, LLOYD D. ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR STEMWELL, LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-09-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER AWARDING COSTS ON DISMISSAL OF ACTION (NO SASE, COPY IN 302 OUTBOX)
